title: Create Profile
subtitle: Follow the steps to complete your profile setup.

sidebar.point1: Save up to 40% on total energy costs

facility.title: Register Your XRGI System
facility.description: If you do not have the system details, save for later at the bottom of the page
facility.modelHint: Model name is on your registration form
facility.xrgiIdHint: The ID number is 8 digits and located on the side of the machine.
facility.addressHint: Enter the address of this system's location
facility.alreadyHaveContract: Do you have a service contract for your XRGI® system ?
facility.alreadyHaveContract2: The information is required to grant your service partner access to our EC POWER Service Database
facility.contractQuestion: Do you already have a service contract for your system?
facility.wantContractQuestion: Do you want a service contract for your ECPower?
facility.wantContract: Are you interested in a service contract with EC POWER?
facility.providerNameHint: Enter the name of the service provider
facility.performanceTitle: We will compare the actual running hours of your XRGI® system to the expected running hours
facility.performanceTitle2: Please find the values in your initial quote* and fill in below
facility.emailHint: (You can enter multiple addresses separated by commas)

Installation.description: Our software users real time electricity market prices (EPEX Day-ahead) to automatically pause energy production, when the market prices are zero or negative
Installation.description2: (This software smartPriceControl is standard on all XRGI® systems from April 2025)
Installation.atService: The software needs to be physically installed on your XRGI® system by your service partner

energyCheckSubtitle: Get a monthly overview of how much you have saved with your XRGI System
